description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: test and package. Add a test job in the test stage that uses the rust:latest Docker image, runs on runners tagged docker, and executes the command `cargo test`. Add a bsd job in the package stage that runs only on the master and dev branches (and not on pipeline triggers), runs on FreeBSD runners tagged erlang-19 and freebsd-11.0, and executes the following shell commands in order: `export SUFFIX=$(if [ \"$CI_BUILD_REF_NAME\" = \"master\" ]; then echo \"\"; else /usr/local/bin/erl -noshell -eval '{{Y, MM, D}, {H, M, S}} = calendar:universal_time(), io:format(\"pre~4.10.0B~2.10.0B~2.10.0B~2.10.0B~2.10.0B~2.10.0B\", [Y, MM, D, H, M, S]),init:stop()'; fi)`, `export OS_VER=$(echo $CI_RUNNER_TAGS | sed 's/.*freebsd-\\([0-9.]*\\).*/\\1/')`, `export ARCH=$(uname -m)`, `export BRANCH=$(if [ \"$CI_BUILD_REF_NAME\" = \"master\" ]; then echo rel; else echo dev; fi)`, `gmake dist`, `aws s3 cp rel/pkgng/*.txz s3://freebsd.project-fifo.net/$BRANCH/$ARCH/$OS_VER/`, and `curl --request POST --form "token=$CI_JOB_TOKEN" --form "ref=master" --form "variables[ARCH]=$ARCH" --form "variables[OS_VER]=$OS_VER" --form "variables[BRANCH]=$BRANCH" https://gitlab.com/api/v4/projects/$PKGNG_REPO_PID/trigger/pipeline`. No caches, artifacts, or services are defined.
